mapper.select:
SELECT TDS.ID TDS_ID, TDS.SCN TDS_SCN, TDS.SHIP_ID TDS_SHIP_ID, CONCAT(CONCAT(TDS.SHIP_NAME,'_'), "TDS".SCN) TDS_SHIP_NAME, TDS.IMP_EXP TDS_IMP_EXP, TDS.TRADE_TYPE TDS_TRADE_TYPE, TDS.LOAD_UNLOAD TDS_LOAD_UNLOAD, TDS.IS_WATER TDS_IS_WATER, TDS.IS_SHORE_POWER TDS_IS_SHORE_POWER, TDS.REQ_WATER TDS_REQ_WATER, TDS.REQ_ELECTRICITY TDS_REQ_ELECTRICITY, TDS.BOW_DRAFT TDS_BOW_DRAFT, TDS.STERN_DRAFT TDS_STERN_DRAFT, TDS.IS_TUG TDS_IS_TUG, TDS.TUG_NUMBER TDS_TUG_NUMBER, TDS.PILOTAGE TDS_PILOTAGE, TDS.IS_PAYMENT TDS_IS_PAYMENT, TDS.PAYMENT_AMOUNT TDS_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDS.IS_DANGEROUS TDS_IS_DANGEROUS, TDS.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN TDS_ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN TDS_LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, TDS.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.BERTH_TIME TDS_BERTH_TIME, TDS.BERTH_ID TDS_BERTH_ID, TDS.BERTH_NAME TDS_BERTH_NAME, TDS.BERTH_TYPE TDS_BERTH_TYPE, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_START TDS_BOLLARD_NO_START, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_END TDS_BOLLARD_NO_END, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME TDS_LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDS.RECEIVE_BY TDS_RECEIVE_BY, TDS.RECEIVE_BY_NAME TDS_RECEIVE_BY_NAME, TDS.RECEIVE_TIME TDS_RECEIVE_TIME, TDS.DEL_FLAG TDS_DEL_FLAG, TDS.DEL_REMARK TDS_DEL_REMARK, TDS.DEL_BY TDS_DEL_BY, TDS.DEL_BY_NAME TDS_DEL_BY_NAME, TDS.DEL_TIME TDS_DEL_TIME, TDS.REMARK TDS_REMARK, TDS.CREATE_BY TDS_CREATE_BY, TDS.CREATE_BY_NAME TDS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TDS.CREATE_TIME TDS_CREATE_TIME, TDS.UPDATE_BY TDS_UPDATE_BY, TDS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TDS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDS.UPDATE_TIME TDS_UPDATE_TIME, TDS.START_PORT_ID TDS_START_PORT_ID, TDS.START_PORT_NAME TDS_START_PORT_NAME, TDS.END_PORT_ID TDS_END_PORT_ID, TDS.END_PORT_NAME TDS_END_PORT_NAME, TDS.PRE_PORT_ID TDS_PRE_PORT_ID, TDS.PRE_PORT_NAME TDS_PRE_PORT_NAME, TDS.NEXT_PORT_ID TDS_NEXT_PORT_ID, TDS.NEXT_PORT_NAME TDS_NEXT_PORT_NAME, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_CODE TDS_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_NAME TDS_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDS.IS_START_WORK TDS_IS_START_WORK, MDD_SIDE.DICT_LABEL MDD_SIDE_BERTH_TYPE_LABEL, SHIP.HATCH_NUM SHIP_HATCH_NUM, "IN".ID IN_ID, "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID IN_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "IN".IMP_EXP IN_IMP_EXP, "IN".TRADE_TYPE IN_TRADE_TYPE, "IN".LOAD_UNLOAD IN_LOAD_UNLOAD, "IN".VOYAGE IN_VOYAGE, "IN".COMPANY_ID IN_COMPANY_ID, "IN".COMPANY_NAME IN_COMPANY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_NUM IN_CARGO_NUM, "IN".CUSTOMER_ID IN_CUSTOMER_ID, "IN".CUSTOMER_NAME IN_CUSTOMER_NAME, "IN".CONTACTS IN_CONTACTS, "IN".SHIP_PHONE IN_SHIP_PHONE, "IN".PAYMENT_AMOUNT IN_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "IN".REMARK IN_REMARK, "IN".CREATE_BY IN_CREATE_BY, "IN".CREATE_BY_NAME IN_CREATE_BY_NAME, "IN".CREATE_TIME IN_CREATE_TIME, "IN".UPDATE_BY IN_UPDATE_BY, "IN".UPDATE_BY_NAME IN_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "IN".UPDATE_TIME IN_UPDATE_TIME, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_NAME IN_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "IN".WORK_START_TIME IN_WORK_START_TIME, "IN".WORK_END_TIME IN_WORK_END_TIME, "OUT".ID OUT_ID, "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID OUT_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "OUT".IMP_EXP OUT_IMP_EXP, "OUT".TRADE_TYPE OUT_TRADE_TYPE, "OUT".LOAD_UNLOAD OUT_LOAD_UNLOAD, "OUT".VOYAGE OUT_VOYAGE, "OUT".COMPANY_ID OUT_COMPANY_ID, "OUT".COMPANY_NAME OUT_COMPANY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_NUM OUT_CARGO_NUM, "OUT".CUSTOMER_ID OUT_CUSTOMER_ID, "OUT".CUSTOMER_NAME OUT_CUSTOMER_NAME, "OUT".CONTACTS OUT_CONTACTS, "OUT".SHIP_PHONE OUT_SHIP_PHONE, "OUT".PAYMENT_AMOUNT OUT_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "OUT".REMARK OUT_REMARK, "OUT".CREATE_BY OUT_CREATE_BY, "OUT".CREATE_BY_NAME OUT_CREATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".CREATE_TIME OUT_CREATE_TIME, "OUT".UPDATE_BY OUT_UPDATE_BY, "OUT".UPDATE_BY_NAME OUT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".UPDATE_TIME OUT_UPDATE_TIME, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_CODE OUT_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_NAME OUT_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "OUT".WORK_START_TIME OUT_WORK_START_TIME, "OUT".WORK_END_TIME OUT_WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "IN" ON ("IN".IMP_EXP = 'IN' AND TDS.ID = "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "OUT" ON ("OUT".IMP_EXP = 'OUT' AND TDS.ID = "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_SIDE ON (MDD_SIDE.DICT_TYPE = 'SIDE' AND TDS.BERTH_TYPE = MDD_SIDE.DICT_VALUE) LEFT JOIN M_SHIP SHIP ON SHIP.ID = TDS.SHIP_ID
ORDER BY BERTH_ID ASC

SELECT TDS.ID TDS_ID, TDS.SCN TDS_SCN, TDS.SHIP_ID TDS_SHIP_ID, CONCAT(CONCAT(TDS.SHIP_NAME,'_'), "TDS".SCN) TDS_SHIP_NAME, TDS.IMP_EXP TDS_IMP_EXP, TDS.TRADE_TYPE TDS_TRADE_TYPE, TDS.LOAD_UNLOAD TDS_LOAD_UNLOAD, TDS.IS_WATER TDS_IS_WATER, TDS.IS_SHORE_POWER TDS_IS_SHORE_POWER, TDS.REQ_WATER TDS_REQ_WATER, TDS.REQ_ELECTRICITY TDS_REQ_ELECTRICITY, TDS.BOW_DRAFT TDS_BOW_DRAFT, TDS.STERN_DRAFT TDS_STERN_DRAFT, TDS.IS_TUG TDS_IS_TUG, TDS.TUG_NUMBER TDS_TUG_NUMBER, TDS.PILOTAGE TDS_PILOTAGE, TDS.IS_PAYMENT TDS_IS_PAYMENT, TDS.PAYMENT_AMOUNT TDS_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDS.IS_DANGEROUS TDS_IS_DANGEROUS, TDS.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN TDS_ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME TDS_LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, TDS.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.BERTH_TIME TDS_BERTH_TIME, TDS.BERTH_ID TDS_BERTH_ID, TDS.BERTH_NAME TDS_BERTH_NAME, TDS.BERTH_TYPE TDS_BERTH_TYPE, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_START TDS_BOLLARD_NO_START, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_END TDS_BOLLARD_NO_END, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME TDS_LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDS.RECEIVE_BY TDS_RECEIVE_BY, TDS.RECEIVE_BY_NAME TDS_RECEIVE_BY_NAME, TDS.RECEIVE_TIME TDS_RECEIVE_TIME, TDS.DEL_FLAG TDS_DEL_FLAG, TDS.DEL_REMARK TDS_DEL_REMARK, TDS.DEL_BY TDS_DEL_BY, TDS.DEL_BY_NAME TDS_DEL_BY_NAME, TDS.DEL_TIME TDS_DEL_TIME, TDS.REMARK TDS_REMARK, TDS.CREATE_BY TDS_CREATE_BY, TDS.CREATE_BY_NAME TDS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TDS.CREATE_TIME TDS_CREATE_TIME, TDS.UPDATE_BY TDS_UPDATE_BY, TDS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TDS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDS.UPDATE_TIME TDS_UPDATE_TIME, TDS.START_PORT_ID TDS_START_PORT_ID, TDS.START_PORT_NAME TDS_START_PORT_NAME, TDS.END_PORT_ID TDS_END_PORT_ID, TDS.END_PORT_NAME TDS_END_PORT_NAME, TDS.PRE_PORT_ID TDS_PRE_PORT_ID, TDS.PRE_PORT_NAME TDS_PRE_PORT_NAME, TDS.NEXT_PORT_ID TDS_NEXT_PORT_ID, TDS.NEXT_PORT_NAME TDS_NEXT_PORT_NAME, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_CODE TDS_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_NAME TDS_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDS.IS_START_WORK TDS_IS_START_WORK, MDD_SIDE.DICT_LABEL MDD_SIDE_BERTH_TYPE_LABEL, SHIP.HATCH_NUM SHIP_HATCH_NUM, "IN".ID IN_ID, "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID IN_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "IN".IMP_EXP IN_IMP_EXP, "IN".TRADE_TYPE IN_TRADE_TYPE, "IN".LOAD_UNLOAD IN_LOAD_UNLOAD, "IN".VOYAGE IN_VOYAGE, "IN".COMPANY_ID IN_COMPANY_ID, "IN".COMPANY_NAME IN_COMPANY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_NUM IN_CARGO_NUM, "IN".CUSTOMER_ID IN_CUSTOMER_ID, "IN".CUSTOMER_NAME IN_CUSTOMER_NAME, "IN".CONTACTS IN_CONTACTS, "IN".SHIP_PHONE IN_SHIP_PHONE, "IN".PAYMENT_AMOUNT IN_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "IN".REMARK IN_REMARK, "IN".CREATE_BY IN_CREATE_BY, "IN".CREATE_BY_NAME IN_CREATE_BY_NAME, "IN".CREATE_TIME IN_CREATE_TIME, "IN".UPDATE_BY IN_UPDATE_BY, "IN".UPDATE_BY_NAME IN_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "IN".UPDATE_TIME IN_UPDATE_TIME, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_NAME IN_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "IN".WORK_START_TIME IN_WORK_START_TIME, "IN".WORK_END_TIME IN_WORK_END_TIME, "OUT".ID OUT_ID, "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID OUT_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "OUT".IMP_EXP OUT_IMP_EXP, "OUT".TRADE_TYPE OUT_TRADE_TYPE, "OUT".LOAD_UNLOAD OUT_LOAD_UNLOAD, "OUT".VOYAGE OUT_VOYAGE, "OUT".COMPANY_ID OUT_COMPANY_ID, "OUT".COMPANY_NAME OUT_COMPANY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_NUM OUT_CARGO_NUM, "OUT".CUSTOMER_ID OUT_CUSTOMER_ID, "OUT".CUSTOMER_NAME OUT_CUSTOMER_NAME, "OUT".CONTACTS OUT_CONTACTS, "OUT".SHIP_PHONE OUT_SHIP_PHONE, "OUT".PAYMENT_AMOUNT OUT_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "OUT".REMARK OUT_REMARK, "OUT".CREATE_BY OUT_CREATE_BY, "OUT".CREATE_BY_NAME OUT_CREATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".CREATE_TIME OUT_CREATE_TIME, "OUT".UPDATE_BY OUT_UPDATE_BY, "OUT".UPDATE_BY_NAME OUT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".UPDATE_TIME OUT_UPDATE_TIME, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_CODE OUT_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_NAME OUT_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "OUT".WORK_START_TIME OUT_WORK_START_TIME, "OUT".WORK_END_TIME OUT_WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "IN" ON ("IN".IMP_EXP = 'IN' AND TDS.ID = "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "OUT" ON ("OUT".IMP_EXP = 'OUT' AND TDS.ID = "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_SIDE ON (MDD_SIDE.DICT_TYPE = 'SIDE' AND TDS.BERTH_TYPE = MDD_SIDE.DICT_VALUE) LEFT JOIN M_SHIP SHIP ON SHIP.ID = TDS.SHIP_ID
ORDER BY TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME DESC nulls last

SELECT TDS.ID TDS_ID, TDS.SCN TDS_SCN, TDS.SHIP_ID TDS_SHIP_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME TDS_SHIP_NAME, TDS.IMP_EXP TDS_IMP_EXP, TDS.TRADE_TYPE TDS_TRADE_TYPE, TDS.LOAD_UNLOAD TDS_LOAD_UNLOAD, TDS.IS_WATER TDS_IS_WATER, TDS.IS_SHORE_POWER TDS_IS_SHORE_POWER, TDS.REQ_WATER TDS_REQ_WATER, TDS.REQ_ELECTRICITY TDS_REQ_ELECTRICITY, TDS.BOW_DRAFT TDS_BOW_DRAFT, TDS.STERN_DRAFT TDS_STERN_DRAFT, TDS.IS_TUG TDS_IS_TUG, TDS.TUG_NUMBER TDS_TUG_NUMBER, TDS.PILOTAGE TDS_PILOTAGE, TDS.IS_PAYMENT TDS_IS_PAYMENT, TDS.PAYMENT_AMOUNT TDS_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDS.IS_DANGEROUS TDS_IS_DANGEROUS, TDS.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN TDS_ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN TDS_LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, TDS.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME TDS_LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.BERTH_TIME TDS_BERTH_TIME, TDS.BERTH_ID TDS_BERTH_ID, TDS.BERTH_NAME TDS_BERTH_NAME, TDS.BERTH_TYPE TDS_BERTH_TYPE, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_START TDS_BOLLARD_NO_START, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_END TDS_BOLLARD_NO_END, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME TDS_LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDS.RECEIVE_BY TDS_RECEIVE_BY, TDS.RECEIVE_BY_NAME TDS_RECEIVE_BY_NAME, TDS.RECEIVE_TIME TDS_RECEIVE_TIME, TDS.DEL_FLAG TDS_DEL_FLAG, TDS.DEL_REMARK TDS_DEL_REMARK, TDS.DEL_BY TDS_DEL_BY, TDS.DEL_BY_NAME TDS_DEL_BY_NAME, TDS.DEL_TIME TDS_DEL_TIME, TDS.REMARK TDS_REMARK, TDS.CREATE_BY TDS_CREATE_BY, TDS.CREATE_BY_NAME TDS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TDS.CREATE_TIME TDS_CREATE_TIME, TDS.UPDATE_BY TDS_UPDATE_BY, TDS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TDS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDS.UPDATE_TIME TDS_UPDATE_TIME, TDS.START_PORT_ID TDS_START_PORT_ID, TDS.START_PORT_NAME TDS_START_PORT_NAME, TDS.END_PORT_ID TDS_END_PORT_ID, TDS.END_PORT_NAME TDS_END_PORT_NAME, TDS.PRE_PORT_ID TDS_PRE_PORT_ID, TDS.PRE_PORT_NAME TDS_PRE_PORT_NAME, TDS.NEXT_PORT_ID TDS_NEXT_PORT_ID, TDS.NEXT_PORT_NAME TDS_NEXT_PORT_NAME, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_CODE TDS_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_NAME TDS_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDS.IS_START_WORK TDS_IS_START_WORK, "IN".ID IN_ID, "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID IN_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "IN".IMP_EXP IN_IMP_EXP, "IN".TRADE_TYPE IN_TRADE_TYPE, "IN".LOAD_UNLOAD IN_LOAD_UNLOAD, "IN".VOYAGE IN_VOYAGE, "IN".COMPANY_ID IN_COMPANY_ID, "IN".COMPANY_NAME IN_COMPANY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "IN".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME IN_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "IN".CARGO_NUM IN_CARGO_NUM, "IN".CUSTOMER_ID IN_CUSTOMER_ID, "IN".CUSTOMER_NAME IN_CUSTOMER_NAME, "IN".CONTACTS IN_CONTACTS, "IN".SHIP_PHONE IN_SHIP_PHONE, "IN".PAYMENT_AMOUNT IN_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "IN".REMARK IN_REMARK, "IN".CREATE_BY IN_CREATE_BY, "IN".CREATE_BY_NAME IN_CREATE_BY_NAME, "IN".CREATE_TIME IN_CREATE_TIME, "IN".UPDATE_BY IN_UPDATE_BY, "IN".UPDATE_BY_NAME IN_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "IN".UPDATE_TIME IN_UPDATE_TIME, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "IN".SHIP_STATUS_NAME IN_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "IN".WORK_START_TIME IN_WORK_START_TIME, "IN".WORK_END_TIME IN_WORK_END_TIME, "OUT".ID OUT_ID, "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID OUT_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, "OUT".IMP_EXP OUT_IMP_EXP, "OUT".TRADE_TYPE OUT_TRADE_TYPE, "OUT".LOAD_UNLOAD OUT_LOAD_UNLOAD, "OUT".VOYAGE OUT_VOYAGE, "OUT".COMPANY_ID OUT_COMPANY_ID, "OUT".COMPANY_NAME OUT_COMPANY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, "OUT".CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME OUT_CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, "OUT".CARGO_NUM OUT_CARGO_NUM, "OUT".CUSTOMER_ID OUT_CUSTOMER_ID, "OUT".CUSTOMER_NAME OUT_CUSTOMER_NAME, "OUT".CONTACTS OUT_CONTACTS, "OUT".SHIP_PHONE OUT_SHIP_PHONE, "OUT".PAYMENT_AMOUNT OUT_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, "OUT".REMARK OUT_REMARK, "OUT".CREATE_BY OUT_CREATE_BY, "OUT".CREATE_BY_NAME OUT_CREATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".CREATE_TIME OUT_CREATE_TIME, "OUT".UPDATE_BY OUT_UPDATE_BY, "OUT".UPDATE_BY_NAME OUT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, "OUT".UPDATE_TIME OUT_UPDATE_TIME, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_CODE OUT_SHIP_STATUS_CODE, "OUT".SHIP_STATUS_NAME OUT_SHIP_STATUS_NAME, "OUT".WORK_START_TIME OUT_WORK_START_TIME, "OUT".WORK_END_TIME OUT_WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "IN" ON ("IN".IMP_EXP = 'IN' AND TDS.ID = "IN".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM "OUT" ON ("OUT".IMP_EXP = 'OUT' AND TDS.ID = "OUT".SHIPVOYAGE_ID) WHERE TDS.ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC(ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, VOYAGE, LOAD_UNLOAD, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, BERTH_TYPE, STOP_TYPE_CODE, STOP_TYPE_NAME, STOP_ID, STOP_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, STOP_TIME_LEN,STOP_HOUR_TYPE_CODE,STOP_HOUR_TYPE_NAME) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dynamicTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dynamicTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dynamicStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dynamicEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{stopName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stopTimeLen}, #{stopHourTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopHourTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE
SHIP_ID = #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_WATER = #{isWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_SHORE_POWER = #{isShorePower, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_WATER = #{reqWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_ELECTRICITY = #{reqElectricity, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOW_DRAFT = #{bowDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STERN_DRAFT = #{sternDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_TUG = #{isTug, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TUG_NUMBER = #{tugNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PILOTAGE = #{pilotage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_PAYMENT = #{isPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
IS_DANGEROUS = #{isDangerous, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN = #{arrivalTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN = #{leavePortTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{arrivalAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{leaveAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_ID = #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
BERTH_NAME = #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_TYPE = #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_START = #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_END = #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_BERTH_TIME = #{leaveBerthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RECEIVE_BY = #{receiveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
RECEIVE_BY_NAME = #{receiveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RECEIVE_TIME = #{receiveTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DEL_REMARK = #{delRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_BY = #{delBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
DEL_BY_NAME = #{delByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_TIME = #{delTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
START_PORT_ID = #{startPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
START_PORT_NAME = #{startPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
END_PORT_ID = #{endPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
END_PORT_NAME = #{endPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRE_PORT_ID = #{prePortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
PRE_PORT_NAME = #{prePortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_PORT_ID = #{nextPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
NEXT_PORT_NAME = #{nextPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS_CODE = #{shipStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS_NAME = #{shipStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_PORT_TIME = #{leavePortTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM
IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VOYAGE = #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NUM = #{cargoNum, jdbcType=INTEGER},
CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONTACTS = #{contacts, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_PHONE = #{shipPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
SHIP_STATUS_CODE = #{shipStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS_NAME = #{shipStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WORK_START_TIME = #{workStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WORK_END_TIME = #{workEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD(ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID, TUG_ID, TUG_NAME, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE_NAME, START_TIME, END_TIME, TIME_LENGTH, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,IS_STANDARD_USE,REASON_CODE,REASON_NAME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.shipDynamicId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.tugId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.tugName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.tugServiceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.tugServiceTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.timeLength, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.isStandardUse, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.reasonCode, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.reasonName, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, VOYAGE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CONTACTS, SHIP_PHONE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_PRD_DOOR_RECORD WHERE SHIP_VOYAGE_ID IN
#{item}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE SET SHIP_ID = #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_NAME = #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_WATER = #{isWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SHORE_POWER = #{isShorePower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_WATER = #{reqWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_ELECTRICITY = #{reqElectricity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BOW_DRAFT = #{bowDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STERN_DRAFT = #{sternDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_TUG = #{isTug, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TUG_NUMBER = #{tugNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER}, PILOTAGE = #{pilotage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_PAYMENT = #{isPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_DANGEROUS = #{isDangerous, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN = #{arrivalTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN = #{leavePortTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{arrivalAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{leaveAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BERTH_ID = #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, BERTH_NAME = #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_TYPE = #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BOLLARD_NO_START = #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BOLLARD_NO_END = #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME = #{leaveBerthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RECEIVE_BY = #{receiveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, RECEIVE_BY_NAME = #{receiveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECEIVE_TIME = #{receiveTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DEL_REMARK = #{delRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEL_BY = #{delBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, DEL_BY_NAME = #{delByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEL_TIME = #{delTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, START_PORT_ID = #{startPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, START_PORT_NAME = #{startPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_PORT_ID = #{endPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, END_PORT_NAME = #{endPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_PORT_ID = #{prePortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, PRE_PORT_NAME = #{prePortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEXT_PORT_ID = #{nextPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, NEXT_PORT_NAME = #{nextPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_STATUS_CODE = #{shipStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_STATUS_NAME = #{shipStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM SET SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOYAGE = #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NUM = #{cargoNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTACTS = #{contacts, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_PHONE = #{shipPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, WORK_START_TIME = #{workStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, WORK_END_TIME = #{workEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SHIP_STATUS_CODE = #{shipStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_STATUS_NAME = #{shipStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_PRD_LOWER_CABIN SET CABIN_NO = #{cabinNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_ID = #{equipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_NO = #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, WORKLOAD = #{workload,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID = #{equipmentTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{equipmentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_DOOR_RECORD SET CABIN_NO = #{cabinNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, WORK_LOAD = #{workload,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_VOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_ID = #{equipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EQUIPMENT_NO = #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD WHERE SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID = #{shipDynamicId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT LOAD_UNLOAD FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸'
SELECT LOAD_UNLOAD FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE IN ('50','60')

SELECT ID id, WORK_TYPE workType, CABIN_NO cabinNo, EQUIPMENT_ID equipmentId, EQUIPMENT_NO equipmentNo, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID equipmentTypeId, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME equipmentTypeName, DEPT_ID deptId, DEPT_NAME deptName, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID shipvoyageId, START_TIME as startTime, END_TIME as endTime, WORKLOAD workLoad, REMARK remark, ROUND((END_TIME - START_TIME) * 24, 1) as cnsc FROM T_PRD_LOWER_CABIN WHERE SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID = #{shipvoyageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_DOOR_RECORD( ID, CABIN_NO, START_TIME, END_TIME, WORK_LOAD, SHIP_VOYAGE_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cabinNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workload,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )

INSERT INTO T_PRD_LOWER_CABIN (ID, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID, WORK_TYPE, CABIN_NO, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, WORKLOAD, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cabinNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentTypeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_PRD_DOOR_RECORD WHERE ID IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId} AND DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = #{dynamicTypeCode} ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, VOYAGE, LOAD_UNLOAD, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, BERTH_TYPE, STOP_TYPE_CODE, STOP_TYPE_NAME, STOP_ID, STOP_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, STOP_HOUR_TYPE_CODE, STOP_HOUR_TYPE_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, VOYAGE, LOAD_UNLOAD, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, BERTH_TYPE, STOP_TYPE_CODE, STOP_TYPE_NAME, STOP_ID, STOP_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC
DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE != '130' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId}
SELECT DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME "dynamicTypeName" FROM ( SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT tdsi.LOAD_UNLOAD ,DECODE( tds.WHARF, '1', 'bhw01', '2', 'bhw04', '3', 'bhw03', '4', 'bhw02' ) "wharf" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE tdsi.id = #{shipvoyageItemId}
select count(*) from T_COST_SHIP where SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId} AND TYPE = '10'

select ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, VOYAGE, LOAD_UNLOAD, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId}

select ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, VOYAGE, LOAD_UNLOAD, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID WHERE (TDS.WHARF = '1' or TDS.WHARF is null) AND TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipVoyageId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}
SELECT decode(msr.stop_reason_type_code, '2', '1', '1', '2', msr.stop_reason_type_code) "stopReasonTypeCode", msr.stop_reason_name "stopReasonName" FROM M_STOP_REASON msr WHERE msr.ID = #{id}
